══ ROUND 2 ══
--- Dwarf — Unarmored Caster --- HP: 43/67 | AC: 15
REASONING: No concentration. Hold Person on Archmage (paralyzed = auto-crit in melee).

→ Archmage: WIS save [d20:3+6=9 vs DC 16] FAIL!
--- Archmage --- HP: 99/99 | AC: 15 | Cond: [paralyzed]
** INCAPACITATED ** Cannot take actions.
END OF TURN: WIS save vs Hold Person [d20:2+6=8 vs DC 16] FAIL. Still paralyzed.
